fields.description: Executes strictly on the local server (e.g. Compiling).
fields.name: Local Server (Default)

fields.description: Broadcasts execution to every ONLINE agent (e.g. Deployment).
fields.name: All Online Agents

fields.description: Executes on the first available ONLINE agent (e.g. Distributed Testing).
fields.name: One Available Agent

fields.description: Executes only on targets explicitly linked via EffectorTarget.
fields.name: Specific Targets

fields.description: Conditional branch based on axoplasm state. Routes to SUCCESS or FAILURE axon.
fields.name: Gate

fields.description: Loop control via axoplasm counter. Retries up to max_retries then fires FAILURE.
fields.name: Retry

fields.description: Pure delay. Waits for configured seconds then passes through.
fields.name: Delay

fields.description: Logs axoplasm state and neuron context to the worker log. Drop into any pathway for visibility.
fields.name: Debug

fields.value: Yo AI dude, do you see this or what? {{provenance.execution_log}}

fields.description: Side-by-side Live Debugging (Remote Server + Local Client)
fields.name: Multiplayer (C&S)
